title: rubus calycinus
intro: Rubus calycinus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant's medicinal properties include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and its ability to stimulate digestion and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Rubus calycinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Rubus calycinus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to address a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
